data.title: [dso:sprint]: Epic completion reached without invoking /dso:end -> session closed without end-session workflow
data.description:
## Actual Behavior
After all tasks were closed, the completion-verifier returned VERIFIED and the epic was transitioned to closed, dso:sprint called merge-to-main.sh directly and exited without invoking /dso:end (end-session workflow). The session ended without generating technical learnings, creating friction bug tickets from the session, or running the session summary steps defined in the end-session skill.

## Expected Behavior
After epic closure and merge-to-main.sh complete, dso:sprint Phase 8 (Session Close) should invoke /dso:end before reporting completion. /dso:end handles: technical learnings generation (Step 2.8), friction bug ticket creation (Step 2.85), worktree clean-state verification (Step 4.75), and session summary.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run /dso:sprint on an epic with children
2. Allow all tasks to complete through Phase 7 (epic closure) and merge-to-main
3. Observe sprint exits without invoking /dso:end

## Context
Observed during execution of epic a171-6c65 on 2026-04-12. The sprint skill's Phase 8 (Session Close) either does not call /dso:end or the orchestrator skipped it after merge-to-main.sh returned.
